_planted_violations_for_demo: IND-AGE-BAR (soft — 'young, energetic, digital native, early twenties')
IND-SUBJECTIVE-CRITERIA (soft — 'culture fit / vibe / one of us')
job_posting:
Growth Lead — Velocity Labs Pvt. Ltd. (Gurugram NCR; hybrid)

We are looking for a young, energetic Growth Lead to drive top-of-funnel for our consumer-fintech app. The ideal candidate is a digital native in their early twenties who can move fast and ship without a playbook.

We are a tight, founder-led team and culture fit matters as much as skill — we hire for vibe and for people who feel like one of us. Past Velocity hires have all come from the same scrappy, hungry archetype.

Responsibilities: own paid + organic acquisition, run rapid creative experiments, partner with content and product, report growth metrics weekly to the founders.
Requirements: 2-4 years in consumer growth (D2C, fintech, or content); fluency in Mixpanel / Amplitude / Meta Ads / Google Ads; bias for action.

criteria.name: Culture fit
criteria.note: Would the founders enjoy working with this person day-to-day?
